description: VHH hallmark metadata used to evaluate whether a framework is camelid VHH-like or human VH-like at key FR2 positions, and to annotate engineering changes.

37.comment: VHH often has more polar/aromatic residue here to compensate for missing VL.

44.comment: E/Q in VHH makes FR2 more hydrophilic; human VH often has G creating hydrophobic VL interface.

45.comment: Positive charge (R/K) is characteristic for VHH; human VH prefers hydrophobic L.

47.comment: Highly conserved W; both VHH and human VH keep this residue.

vhh_like_threshold.description: If a framework keeps ≥3 positions in VHH-typical amino acids, VHH-like FR2.

human_like_threshold.description: If only 0–1 hallmark positions remain VHH-typical and others are human-like, human-like FR2.

mixed_state.description: Between thresholds is 'mixed/transition' state, often used in engineered scaffolds.

fields.is_vhh_like: boolean, true if score above vhh_like_threshold.
fields.is_human_like: boolean, true if score below human_like_threshold.
